user_query: My family and I are looking for a new TV series to watch. Can you search for titles related to 'comedy' and 'drama'? Also, find some places in Los Angeles, California where we can go for a family outing. And fetch some reviews for those places as well.

TaskList.description: Search for TV series titles related to 'comedy' and 'drama'.
Find places in Los Angeles, California suitable for family outings.
Fetch reviews for the selected outing places in Los Angeles.
